signal_points: Hashprice compression below $32/PH/day pressures less efficient miners towards capitulation.
STRC's stability at par, despite low hashprice, suggests market values yield over BTC backing.
An imminent difficulty increase will further stress miners if BTC price doesn't rally.

btc_price: BTC price resilience near $68.7k supports current hashprice but offers little margin expansion.
Any BTC price dip below $66k risks triggering further miner capitulation and hashprice drops.
hashprice: Current hashprice at $31.31/PH/day signals profitability squeeze for S19j Pro and legacy miners.
Hashprice is driven by BTC price strength versus an elevated network hashrate, compressing margins.
difficulty: Flat difficulty masks underlying pressure as hashrate nears 900 EH/s, impacting mid-tier miners.
Aggressive global hashrate growth continues to compress margins for less efficient mining operations.
bmn_revenue: BMN daily revenue of ₿8.03 suggests consistent operational uptime offsetting low hashprice.
BMN yield will remain compressed unless hashprice rises significantly or network hashrate falls.
strc: STRC trading at par ($100) indicates neutral market sentiment, balancing yield demand and risk.
STRC's stable 4.2x BTC Rating implies no significant BTC sales or dilution recently.
bmn_hashrate: BMN fleet's 27.8 EH/s shows solid uptime, generating rewards despite current hashprice levels.
BMN's steady hashrate share is crucial for consistent revenue even as network hashrate climbs.
